tasks.content: Design Extension interface and registry system architecture
Create src/tools/extensions/ directory structure
Implement ExtensionRegistry class with tool discovery and registration
Create base Extension abstract class with lifecycle hooks
Implement GitExtension with core git operations (status, diff, commit, push, pull)
Write unit tests for ExtensionRegistry (registration, discovery, error handling)
Write unit tests for GitExtension tool definitions
Integrate extensions into main.ts runtime factory
Update AGENT_METRICS.md with Phase 12 progress
Update AGENT_PROFILE.md with extensions module analysis
Update EVOLUTION.md with Phase 12 completion
Update TODO.md with Phase 12 completed tasks log
Git commit: 'feat: extensions framework - registry + git extension'
Design Codebase Indexer API and scope (queries, output format)
Create src/tools/indexer/ directory structure
Implement AST scanner using TypeScript compiler API
Create indexer ToolDefinition with parameters (pattern, symbol type)
Write unit tests for indexer (sample project fixture)
Integrate indexer tool into main runtime
Update documentation (PROJECT_STATE, AGENT_METRICS, AGENT_PROFILE, EVOLUTION, TODO)
Git commit: 'feat: codebase indexer - AST scanning'
Design Context Compaction API (summarize, truncate, token estimation)
Create src/tools/compaction/ directory structure
Implement compaction algorithm (sliding window or hierarchical summarization)
Write unit tests for compaction (short, medium, long sessions)
Integrate compaction tool into main runtime
Update documentation (PROJECT_STATE, AGENT_METRICS, AGENT_PROFILE, EVOLUTION, TODO)
Git commit: 'chore: evolution round - Phase 14 Context Compaction complete'
Design skill testing framework (mock LLM, validate outputs)
Write unit tests for SkillEngine (load skill, validate parameters, execution)
Write tests for built-in refactor.extract-function skill
Write tests for built-in test.generate-unit-test skill
Write tests for built-in doc.generate-jsdoc skill
Update documentation (PROJECT_STATE, AGENT_METRICS, AGENT_PROFILE, EVOLUTION, TODO)
Git commit: 'feat: skills testing framework - comprehensive skill tests'
Audit test files for any usage in mocks (rg -n 'as any')
Replace any with proper SDK interfaces or unknown (incremental)
Run full test suite after each file change to ensure no regressions
Update documentation (PROJECT_STATE, AGENT_METRICS, AGENT_PROFILE, EVOLUTION, TODO)
Git commit: 'refactor: type safety - reduce any usage in test mocks'
